title: Friday Night Quiz
description: A lively mix of geography, science, culture and creativity.

questions.question: What is the capital of New Zealand?
Name the three primary colours of light.
questions.notes: Award one point per correct colour; answers may be given in any order.

questions.question: Pitch the worst possible name for a luxury hotel.
Which planet has the shortest day in our solar system?
questions.notes: Jupiter rotates once in about 10 hours.

questions.question: In what year was the first iPhone released?
